HGSS.111.0000:
Lance: Are you all right?\f
Your Pokémon are hurt and tired.
Here, give them some of my medicine.\f
HGSS.111.0001:
Lance: [0103,0000,0000], let’s give our
best for Pokémon.\f
HGSS.111.0002:
Lance: [0103,0000,0000], let’s give our
best for Pokémon.\f
HGSS.111.0004:
Ariana: We can’t let a brat like you
do as you please forever.\f
It’ll hurt Team Rocket’s pride over and
over again. Making it lessen, you see.\f
...So, it’s time to finish you. However
strong you may be, if the two of us\r
fight at the same time, you’ll have no\r
chance of winning. Don’t you agree?\f
Hee hee hee! Sorry, baby. Now, get
ready to be thrashed.\f
HGSS.111.0005:
Lance: Hold it!\f
A two-on-one battle?
That is so unfair!\f
Typical of Team Rocket to be so sneaky.
Allow me to join the battle!\f
HGSS.111.0006:
Ariana: What? You had an accomplice?
Where is your sense of dignity?\f
As interim boss in place of Giovanni,
I’ll show you how wrong it is to meddle\r
with Team Rocket!\f
HGSS.111.0007:
Tch, you really are strong.
It’s too bad.\f
If you were to join Team Rocket, you
could become an Executive.\f
HGSS.111.0008:
Ariana: But that’s fine. The broadcast
experiment was a total success.\f
It doesn’t matter what happens to this
hideout now.\f
We have much bigger plans.
You’ll come to appreciate Team\r
Rocket’s true power soon enough.\f
Enjoy yourself while you can...
Hee hee hee...\f
HGSS.111.0009:
Lance: That did it. We defeated all the
members of Team Rocket here.\f
But I’m concerned about the young guy
with red hair I battled in the\r
process...\f
HGSS.111.0010:
Sorry, [0103,0000,0000]. I saw how well you
were doing, so I just hung back.\f
Now all there is left to do is to turn
off that odd radio signal.\f
HGSS.111.0011:
Sorry, [0103,0000,0000]. I saw how well you
were doing, so I just hung back.\f
Now all there is left to do is to turn
off that odd radio signal.\f
HGSS.111.0012:
It’s this machine that’s causing all the
problems. I don’t see a switch on it...\f
We have no choice. We have to make all
the ELECTRODE faint.\f
That should stop this machine from
transmitting that strange signal.\f
It’s no fault of the ELECTRODE, so it
makes me feel sad.\f
[0103,0000,0000], let’s split the job.\f
HGSS.111.0013:
It’s this machine that’s causing all the
problems. I don’t see a switch on it...\f
We have no choice. We have to make all
the ELECTRODE faint.\f
That should stop this machine from
transmitting that strange signal.\f
It’s no fault of the ELECTRODE, so it
makes me feel sad.\f
[0103,0000,0000], let’s split the job.\f
HGSS.111.0014: Lance: Leave this side to me.\f
HGSS.111.0015:
Lance: That odd signal has finally
stopped. The lake should be back to\r
normal. You’re the best!\f
Let me thank you on behalf of all the
Pokémon. Oh, yes. You should take this.\f
I found it here, but I don’t have any
need for it.\f
HGSS.111.0017:
Lance: That’s Whirlpool.\f
Teach it to a Pokémon to get across wild
water. But keep this in mind.\f
You can use that out of battle only with
the Badge from Mahogany Gym.\f
HGSS.111.0018:
[0103,0000,0000]...\f
The journey to becoming the Pokémon
Champion is long and difficult.\f
Knowing that, will you keep going?\f
..................\f
I see. No, you’re right.\f
If you would give up that easily,
you would have never chased that\r
dream in the first place.\f
I look forward to seeing you again!\f
HGSS.111.0019:

HGSS.111.0020:
“The Radio Transmitter”\f
It seems that this door checks the
voice of the person saying the password\r
before it opens...
HGSS.111.0021:
The door’s closed...\f
[0103,0000,0000] entered the password.\f
The door opened!\f
HGSS.111.0022:
It’s the radio transmitter that’s
sending the sinister signal.\f
It’s working at full capacity.
HGSS.111.0023:
The radio transmitter has finally
stopped its evil broadcast.
HGSS.111.0024:
MURKROW: The password is...\r
Hail Giovanni.\f
HGSS.111.0025:
MURKROW: The password is...\r
Hail Giovanni.\f
HGSS.111.0026:
MURKROW: The password is...\r
Hail Giovanni.\f
HGSS.111.0027:
MURKROW screamed the password,
mimicking the voice of Petrel.\f
..................\f
The voice-recognition system unlocked
the door!\f
